details: Build a simple to-do list app where users can add, complete, and delete tasks

steps.description:
Create a Product Requirements Document (PRD) based on the feature description.

1. Read the task description carefully
2. Write requirements for ONLY what the user asked for
3. Do NOT add features the user did not request

Save the PRD to `requirements.md`.
steps.name: Requirements

steps.description:
Create a technical specification based on the PRD in `requirements.md`.

1. Assess the task complexity (simple, medium, complex)
2. Choose technology that matches the task — simple tasks need simple tech
3. Write a spec sized to match the task

Save to `spec.md`.
steps.name: Technical Specification

steps.description:
Create a detailed implementation plan based on `spec.md`.

1. Assess task complexity (simple, medium, complex)
2. Break down the work into categories matching the complexity
3. Simple tasks: 1 category. Medium: 2-3. Complex: 3-5.

Save to `implementation-plan.md`.
steps.name: Planning

steps.description: This step will be replaced with the implementation tasks from Planning.
steps.name: Implementation
